confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_ccb098c5-1790-4122-aaca-8712d1856e2c read back as promoted

evidence: Task 1169 handles evidence repair after accepted review.
Task 1174 handles forward-momentum law for prototype/facade transitions.
Part of task 1173 handles side-effect visibility and residual routing ergonomics.
proposal: Pull these symptoms back into a single closure posture concept: capability_complete, scope_complete_with_continuation, scope_complete_with_deferral, repair_required, and blocked.
payload.recommendation: Commission a simplifying task before implementing separate one-off lifecycle patches.
payload.summary: Recent CAPAs around evidence repair, facade/prototype continuation, forward momentum, CAPA triggers, and inbox routing point to one simplification: task closure/review needs a typed closure posture so partial completion exposes residual crossings before being treated as done.
payload.title: Pullback: typed closure posture for task completion residuals
